vibe: Deep house roots, UK jazz explorations, Japanese city pop gems, Brazilian warmth & left-field electronic — digging through the crates of adjacent worlds

tracks.name: Falling Up - Carl Craig Remix
tracks.reason: Detroit deep house royalty — Carl Craig reworks Theo Parrish into a hypnotic roller. Adjacent to Chris Stussy and Moodymann territory.

tracks.name: Yellow Dandelion
tracks.reason: UK jazz keys meet broken beat grooves — the spiritual cousin of Yussef Dayes' rhythmic explorations.

tracks.name: Home
tracks.reason: Psychedelic electronic warmth — Caribou bridges Four Tet's textures with house-inflected songwriting.

tracks.name: TOWN
tracks.reason: City pop royalty — Minako's jazz-funk sophistication sits alongside Taeko Onuki and Tatsuro Yamashita.

tracks.name: Raw Cuts #5
tracks.reason: Raw, sample-heavy deep house from Danilo Plessow — warm vinyl crackle meets dancefloor heat. Adjacent to Kerri Chandler.

tracks.name: Cirrus
tracks.reason: Shimmering downtempo that builds from whisper to anthem — bridges Boards of Canada's warmth with dancefloor energy.

tracks.name: Emerald Rush
tracks.reason: Propulsive techno with Aphex Twin's attention to texture and Brian Eno's ambient DNA in its bones.

tracks.name: Morning Factory
tracks.reason: Chicago deep house legend — a sunrise anthem of pure warmth. The spiritual centre of this playlist.

tracks.name: Equation
tracks.reason: Balearic-tinged deep house — sun-soaked grooves adjacent to Folamour and Jimpster territory.

tracks.name: Try n Follow
tracks.reason: Broken beat maestro — the missing link between Floating Points' jazz-electronic fusion and Yussef Dayes' UK jazz energy.
